name: Apple Breakfast Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour and baking powder, salt, and brown sugar.
2. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add raisins to the mixture.
4. Gradually add milk and egg, stirring until a stiff dough forms.
5. Mix thoroughly.
6. Pour into a well-oiled shallow pan.
7. Brush dough with melted butter.
8. Arrange apples in rows on top of the dough, overlapping edges.
9. Sprinkle apples with remaining cinnamon and brown sugar mixture.
10. Bake in a moderate oven (400°F) for 20 minutes or until apples are tender.
9 servings. 1941
